mapper.sql: a.id, a.title, a.content, a.publisher_id, a.status, a.create_time, a.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , u.username as publisher_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.publisher_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT , u.username as publisher_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.publisher_id = u.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT , u.username as publisher_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.publisher_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement WHERE status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, publisher_id, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{status})
